questionHtml:
What is/are required for facilitated diffusion?

I. A concentration gradient

II. ATP

III. A channel protein

A. I only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: What is/are required for facilitated diffusion? I. A concentration gradient II. ATP III. A channel protein A. I only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
breadcrumbLabels: B2.1.6. Channel proteins for facilitated diffusion
